items.title_en: VoidZero Is Joining Cloudflare
items.title_zh: VoidZero 加入 Cloudflare
items.summary_en: Cloudflare welcomes VoidZero to its ecosystem, expanding its network of partners and collaborators. The arrangement is expected to bring VoidZero's capabilities into Cloudflare's edge and security stack, enabling joint tooling for developers building on Cloudflare's platform. This underscores Cloudflare's strategy of growing a robust, partner-driven developer ecosystem.
items.summary_zh: Cloudflare 宣布 VoidZero 加入其生态系统，作为扩展开发者生态和安全协作的一部分。双方的整合将把 VoidZero 的技术引入 Cloudflare 的边缘与安全栈，帮助开发者在 Cloudflare 平台上构建与保护应用。此举体现 Cloudflare 持续打造以伙伴为驱动的生态策略。

items.title_en: In a first, wind and solar generated more power than gas globally in April 2026
items.title_zh: 2026年4月全球风能与太阳能发电量首次超过天然气
items.summary_en: In April 2026, wind and solar combined generated more electricity globally than natural gas, marking a historic first. The milestone underscores accelerating deployment of renewables and invites discussion about storage, grid resilience, and the role of gas in a rapidly decarbonizing energy system.
items.summary_zh: 4月全球风能和太阳能发电量合计首次超过天然气，成为历史性里程碑。该里程碑凸显可再生能源的快速扩张，也引发对储能、并网与天然气在日益 decarbonizing 的能源体系中的角色的讨论。

items.title_en: Google Employees Internally Share Memes About How Its AI Sucks
items.title_zh: 谷歌员工内部梗图：AI 表现不佳
items.summary_en: Internal memes at Google reveal frustration with the perceived quality and trajectory of its AI products, highlighting tensions between ambition and execution. The memes surface concerns around model quality, reliability, and product roadmap in a competitive AI landscape.
items.summary_zh: 谷歌员工内部梗图反映出对公司 AI 产品质量与发展方向的挫败感，揭示在激烈的 AI 竞赛中对模型质量、可靠性和产品路线的担忧与矛盾。

items.title_en: French-Iranian author Marjane Satrapi, author of 'Persepolis', dies at 56
items.title_zh: 法国-伊朗作家玛尔詹娜·萨特拉皮去世，享年56岁
items.summary_en: Marjane Satrapi, the acclaimed author of Persepolis, dies at 56. Her graphic memoir bridged personal history and political upheaval, influencing generations of readers and artists worldwide. Her death marks a significant loss for comics, literature, and diasporic voices.
items.summary_zh: 著名图像小说《 Persepolis 》作者玛尔詹娜·萨特拉皮去世，享年56岁。她以图像化的自传叙述将个人经历与政治动荡相连，影响了全球无数读者与艺术家。她的离世对漫画、文学和侨民声音而言都是重大损失。

items.title_en: Ian's Secure Shoelace Knot
items.title_zh: 伊恩的安全鞋带打结方法
items.summary_en: Describes a simple knot designed for security to prevent laces from loosening during activity. The page lays out steps and tips to achieve a tight, reliable knot, backed by practical demonstrations.
items.summary_zh: 介绍了一种简单但稳固的鞋带打结法，能够在活动中防止鞋带松散。文章给出具体步骤与要点，并辅以实用演示，适合日常使用。

items.title_en: They’re made out of weights
items.title_zh: 它们是由权重构成的
items.summary_en: Some systems are described as being fundamentally built from weights.
items.summary_zh: 有些系统被描述为本质上由权重构成。

items.title_en: UK media fails to disclose defence sector links in nearly 60% of cases
items.title_zh: 英国媒体在近60%的报道中未披露防务领域关联
items.summary_en: An analysis finds UK media frequently omits defence-sector links among the sources they cite, with disclosure missing in almost 60% of cases. The lack of transparency raises questions about conflicts of interest shaping coverage on arms, policy debates, and public trust in journalism. Strengthening disclosure norms could help readers better assess credibility.
items.summary_zh: 一项分析显示，英国媒体在报道中经常未披露与防务行业相关的利益关系，近60%的案例缺乏披露。这种透明度不足可能影响军备议题报道的客观性并削弱公众对新闻的信任。完善披露标准有助于读者更准确评估报道可信度。

items.title_en: The LLM warnings Google fired Timnit Gebru over have all come true
items.title_zh: Timnit Gebru 的 LLM 警告如今全部应验
items.summary_en: The piece argues that warnings about LLM risks—raised surrounding Timnit Gebru's departure—have largely come true, including concerns about bias, safety, governance, and societal impact. It underlines the need for responsible AI practices and greater transparency as models scale.
items.summary_zh: 本文认为围绕大语言模型风险的警告在 Timnit Gebru 事件后逐步成为现实，涉及偏见、安全、治理与社会影响等方面。强调在模型规模扩大背景下，需要更负责任的 AI 实践与更高透明度。

items.title_en: KVarN: Native vLLM KV-cache quantization back end by Huawei
items.title_zh: 华为推出 KVarN：原生 vLLM KV 缓存量化后端
items.summary_en: Huawei unveils KVarN, a native vLLM back end that uses a KV-cache quantization technique to accelerate large-language-model inference while cutting memory usage. By quantizing the key-value cache, it reduces bandwidth and memory pressure, enabling higher throughput on commodity hardware. This addition enriches the ecosystem of efficient LLM serving back ends and could influence deployment choices for enterprise AI.
items.summary_zh: 华为推出 KVarN，是一个原生 vLLM 的 KV 缓存量化后端，旨在在不牺牲性能的前提下降低推理时的显存与带宽压力。通过对键值缓存进行量化，它提高了吞吐量并降低内存需求，方便在企业级服务器上部署大模型。

items.title_en: Elixir v1.20: Now a gradually typed language
items.title_zh: Elixir v1.20：逐步类型化语言
items.summary_en: Elixir 1.20 introduces gradual typing, letting developers opt into type checks without breaking dynamic code. This enables stronger tooling and safer APIs while preserving Elixir’s flexible, productive vibe.
items.summary_zh: Elixir 1.20 引入渐进式类型系统，开发者可以在不强制改动现有动态代码的前提下逐步打上类型标记。这提升工具链的准确性，帮助接口设计更安全，同时保留 Elixir 的灵活与高效开发体验。

items.title_en: Gaussian Point Splatting
items.title_zh: 高斯点雾化绘制
items.summary_en: Gaussian Point Splatting introduces rendering with Gaussian patches per point, delivering smoother edges and depth-aware blending compared to traditional splats. The approach, showcased at SIGGRAPH 2026, enhances quality for large scenes and aligns well with neural rendering pipelines, signaling a practical advance in point-based graphics.
items.summary_zh: 高斯点雾化绘制提出将每个点表示为高斯斑块的点云/点基渲染方法，相较传统点雾化在抗锯齿、深度混合方面更为平滑与稳定。该方法有望提升大规模场景的实时或近实时渲染质量，并与神经渲染流程更好协同。

items.title_en: Failing grades soar with AI usage, dwindling math skills in Berkeley CS classes
items.title_zh: AI 使用激增导致伯克利计算机系课程不及格率攀升，数学能力下降
items.summary_en: Berkeley CS instructors report a spike in failing grades as AI usage increases in coursework, accompanied by a perceived decline in math skills among students. The trend underscores a broader tension between AI-assisted learning and mastery of fundamentals, suggesting the need for new assessment methods and curriculum adjustments.
items.summary_zh: 随着 AI 在课程中的使用增加，伯克利计算机科学课程的不及格率攀升，数学基础能力也在下降。这一现象凸显了 AI 辅助学习与基础知识掌握之间的张力，促使课程设计和评估方式需要改革。

items.title_en: Show HN: Boxes.dev: ditch localhost; run Claude Code and Codex in the cloud
items.title_zh: Boxes.dev：在云端运行 Claude Code 与 Codex
items.summary_en: Boxes.dev lets you run Claude Code and Codex in the cloud, ditching localhost runtimes and hardware constraints. It provides a managed environment for AI coding assistants, enabling rapid experimentation and collaboration without requiring local GPUs.
items.summary_zh: Boxes.dev 让 Claude Code 与 Codex 在云端运行，摆脱本地运行时和硬件限制。为开发者提供一个托管的 AI 编码助手环境，便于快速试验与协作，无需本地 GPU。

items.title_en: U.S. to dismantle system tracking Atlantic currents that are at risk of collapse
items.title_zh: 美国将拆除对濒临崩溃风险的大西洋环流监测系统
items.summary_en: Policy moves to retire the monitoring system tracking Atlantic currents amid concerns about AMOC stability, raising questions about data availability for climate forecasting and research.
items.summary_zh: 关于美国计划拆除对大西洋环流监测的系统，担忧 AMOC 可能崩溃，数据缺失将影响气候预测与研究。

items.title_en: Gemma 4 12B: A unified, encoder-free multimodal model
items.title_zh: Gemma 4 12B：一个统一的无需编码器的多模态模型
items.summary_en: Gemma 4 12B is Google's encoder-free, unified multimodal model designed to handle text, image, and other modalities with a single architecture. By removing dedicated encoders, it aims to simplify training and inference while enabling more flexible cross-modal tasks. This approach could lower engineering friction for developers building multimodal applications.
items.summary_zh: Gemma 4 12B 是谷歌推出的无编码器、统一的多模态模型，能够用同一架构处理文本、图像等模态。取消独立编码器的设计旨在简化训练和推理，为跨模态任务带来更大的灵活性。此类设计若成熟，可能降低多模态应用的工程门槛。

items.title_en: Show HN: Uruky (EU-based Kagi alternative) now has Image Search and URL Rewrites
items.title_zh: Show HN：Uruky（欧盟基地的 Kagi 替代方案）现已支持图片搜索与 URL 重写
items.summary_en: Uruky, an EU-based alternative to Kagi, just added image search and URL rewrites, extending its usefulness for embedding search in apps. The update signals growing demand for privacy-respecting, Europe-aligned search tooling as developers seek alternatives to US-centric providers.
items.summary_zh: 作为欧盟基地的 Kagi 替代方案，Uruky 现在新增图片搜索和 URL 重写，增强了在应用中集成搜索的灵活性。此更新体现出对隐私友好、符合欧盟规定的搜索工具需求增长，开发者正在寻求 US 主导提供商之外的替代方案。

items.title_en: Artificial intelligence is not conscious
items.title_zh: 人工智能并非具备意识——Ted Chiang
items.summary_en: Ted Chiang argues that current AI lacks true consciousness and subjective experience; he distinguishes between sophisticated pattern recognition and genuine sentience. The piece further explores ethical and policy implications, urging careful framing of AI capabilities and responsibilities.
items.summary_zh: Ted Chiang 认为当前的人工智能并非真正具备意识或主观体验；它们只是高度复杂的模式识别系统。文章还讨论伦理与政策含义，呼吁对 AI 能力与责任进行谨慎界定。

items.title_en: I built a vulnerable app and spent $1,500 seeing if LLMs could hack it
items.title_zh: 我构建了一个易被利用的应用，花了1500美元测试大型语言模型是否能入侵
items.summary_en: I built a vulnerable app and spent $1,500 seeing if LLMs could hack it. The experiment demonstrates the real security risks of AI-assisted tooling and how quickly attackers might automate vulnerability discovery.
items.summary_zh: 我构建了一个易被利用的应用，花了1500美元测试大型语言模型是否能入侵。实验揭示了利用 AI 辅助工具进行安全攻击的现实风险，以及攻击者自动化漏洞利用的潜在速度。

items.title_en: I was recently diagnosed with anti-NMDA receptor encephalitis
items.title_zh: 我最近被诊断患上抗 NMDA 受体脑炎
items.summary_en: A personal account of being diagnosed with anti-NMDA receptor encephalitis, a rare autoimmune condition that can mimic psychiatric illness. The post emphasizes the difficulty of correct diagnosis and the importance of awareness among clinicians and patients. It sheds light on the intersection of neurology and mental health.
items.summary_zh: 作者分享罕见的抗 NMDA 受体脑炎诊断经历，这种疾病常因症状类似精神疾病而误诊。文章强调正确诊断的难度，以及提高临床与患者对该病的认知重要性，彰显神经科与精神健康的交叉议题。

items.title_en: Meta workers can opt out of being tracked at work up to 30 min
items.title_zh: Meta 员工可在工作时最多不被追踪30分钟
items.summary_en: Meta has updated its employee monitoring policy to allow workers to opt out of being tracked for up to 30 minutes at a time. The change underscores the tension between productivity analytics and employee privacy in big tech.
items.summary_zh: Meta 更新员工监控政策，允许员工单次最多有30分钟不被追踪。此举凸显了大科技公司在生产力分析与员工隐私之间的权衡。

items.title_en: When su replaced login for becoming another Unix login
items.title_zh: su 替代登录成为另一个 Unix 用户的探讨
items.summary_en: The post explains how the su command can substitute the current session for another user, effectively bypassing a full login, and contrasts this with authentic login behavior. It discusses security implications, auditing, and why sudo is often preferred for traceable privilege elevation.
items.summary_zh: 文章解释了如何通过 su 命令将当前会话替换为另一个用户的身份，从而在某种程度上绕过完整登录，并对比了与真正登录的行为差异。讨论了安全性、审计以及在日常运维中为何更应偏好 sudo 以实现可追踪的特权提升。

items.title_en: Pwnd Blaster: Hacking your PC using your speaker without ever touching it
items.title_zh: Hacking your PC using your speaker without ever touching it
items.summary_en: Researchers demonstrate a BadUSB-style attack that uses a speaker to compromise a PC without any direct user interaction. The technique underlines how trusted hardware can be weaponized through subtle channels, raising concerns about supply chain, peripherals, and device authentication. It highlights the risk of peripheral-based exploits and the need for hardware-level defenses.
items.summary_zh: 研究人员展示了利用扬声器进行 BadUSB 式攻击、在无需任何直接交互的情况下入侵电脑的可能性。这一技巧暴露了受信任硬件可被通过微妙通道 weaponize 的风险，凸显了外设信任、供应链与硬件认证方面的挑战。

items.title_en: DaVinci Resolve 21
items.title_zh: 达芬奇 Resolve 21
items.summary_en: DaVinci Resolve 21 bundles improved color tools, performance, and cloud-friendly collaboration, with AI-assisted features that appeal to prosumers and studios alike.
items.summary_zh: DaVinci Resolve 21 包含更强的色彩工具、性能提升及云端协作功能，并新增 AI 支持特性，适合专业与准专业工作流。

items.title_en: Uber's $1,500/month AI limit is a useful signal for AI tool pricing
items.title_zh: Uber 将 AI 工具使用额度设定为每月 1500 美元，为定价提供信号
items.summary_en: Uber caps AI tool usage at $1,500 per month, a concrete pricing signal for enterprise AI tooling. The cap affects individual power users and teams alike, influencing how startups and enterprises budget for copilots, assistants, and automation. It underscores the market’s sensitivity to costs and value at scale.
items.summary_zh: Uber 将 AI 工具使用额度设定为每月 1500 美元，为企业级 AI 工具定价提供了明确信号。该上限影响个人与团队的使用成本，促使初创公司与企业在成本与价值之间权衡。

items.title_en: MacBook Neo is so popular that Apple doubled production
items.title_zh: MacBook Neo 火爆，苹果将产量翻倍
items.summary_en: The MacBook Neo has proven popular enough for Apple to double production, signaling strong demand for Apple Silicon laptops in 2026. It hints at supply chain resilience and the ongoing push to higher-performance, battery-friendly devices in premium markets.
items.summary_zh: MacBook Neo 需求强劲，苹果已将产量翻倍，反映出 2026 年对 Apple Silicon 笔记本的强劲需求。此举也揭示了供应链的韧性和高性能、长电池续航的高端笔记本市场热度。

items.title_en: The ways we contain Claude across products
items.title_zh: 我们在各产品中对 Claude 的 containment 方法
items.summary_en: Across products, we implement multiple containment layers for Claude: guardrails, input filtering, rate limits, and a policy-driven oversight model. The goal is to prevent unsafe outputs while preserving useful capabilities.
items.summary_zh: 在各产品中对 Claude 的 containment 包括多层安全策略、输入输出过滤、速率限流与策略治理等。目标是在保留有用功能的同时尽量避免不安全输出。

items.title_en: ESP32-S31
items.title_zh: ESP32-S31 芯片
items.summary_en: Espressif's ESP32-S31 expands the low-power IoT SoC family with a focus on security and edge ML. The platform aims to deliver more secure, capable microcontrollers for smart devices, sensors, and wearables, broadening opportunities for on-device AI and encryption. As edge computing grows, S31 chips may accelerate privacy-preserving smart products.
items.summary_zh: Espressif 推出 ESP32-S31，扩展低功耗物联网系统芯片家族，强调安全性并支持边缘机器学习。该平台为智能设备、传感器和穿戴设备提供更安全、功能更强的微控制器，推动就地 AI 与加密能力。随着边缘计算兴起，S31 可能加速隐私保护型智能产品的落地。

items.title_en: 32GB of DDR5 now costs $375 – AI shortage continues to squeeze PC building
items.title_zh: 32GB DDR5现价375美元—AI短缺持续挤压PC组装成本
items.summary_en: DDR5 memory for 32GB modules has risen to around $375, reflecting AI-driven demand pressures. The price squeeze affects DIY PC builders and smaller workloads, nudging buyers toward different configurations.
items.summary_zh: 32GB DDR5 内存现价约375美元，反映 AI 相关需求的上行压力。价格紧缩影响 DIY PC 构建者与小型工作负载，推动用户调整为其他配置。

items.title_en: A Post-Quantum Future for Let's Encrypt
items.title_zh: Let's Encrypt 的后量子时代
items.summary_en: Let's Encrypt outlines a plan for a post-quantum TLS ecosystem, including preparing for quantum-resistant certificates and hybrid crypto approaches. The move reflects the broader industry shift toward quantum-safe web security and the need for gradual crypto migrations without breaking existing sites.
items.summary_zh: Let’s Encrypt 发布后量子时代路线图，计划为 TLS 引入抗量子证书并采用混合加密策略。此举反映了行业向量子安全的转型，以及在不破坏现有网站的前提下逐步完成加密迁移的必要性。

items.title_en: PlayStation Architecture
items.title_zh: PlayStation 架构
items.summary_en: PlayStation architecture deep dive reveals Sony’s hardware choices across CPU, GPU, memory, and IO, with implications for game performance, dev tooling, and platform longevity.
items.summary_zh: PlayStation 架构的深入解析揭示了索尼在 CPU/GPU、内存和 I/O 等方面的硬件取舍，对游戏性能、开发工具链和平台生命周期有重要影响。

items.title_en: A Man Who Reads Books for a Living
items.title_zh: 以读书为职业：平均两天一本的阅读人生
items.summary_en: The piece profiles a professional reader who consumes a book roughly every two days, exploring what such a job entails, the discipline, and how constant reading shapes knowledge work. It offers reflections on the value of deep reading and the human labor behind curation.
items.summary_zh: 本文介绍一位以读书为生的职业读者，约两天就读完一本书，探讨这份工作的日常、所需的专注力以及持续阅读如何影响知识工作。也反映了深度阅读的价值和书目筛选背后的劳动。

items.title_en: Ableton Extensions SDK
items.title_zh: Ableton 扩展 SDK
items.summary_en: Ableton has released Extensions SDK to let developers build add-ons that extend Live’s functionality. This opens the door to new devices, control surfaces, and automation workflows, expanding the toolchain for producers and performers. The move signals a shift toward a more extensible, community-driven ecosystem around Live.
items.summary_zh: Ableton 发布了 Extensions SDK，允许开发者为 Live 构建扩展插件，扩展其功能。开发者将能创建新设备、控制界面和自动化工作流，提升制作人与演出者的工作效率。此举标志着 Live 将向更开放、由社区驱动的生态系统迈进。

items.title_en: Gooey: A GPU-accelerated UI framework for Zig
items.title_zh: Gooey：用于 Zig 的 GPU 加速 UI 框架
items.summary_en: Gooey is a GPU-accelerated UI framework for Zig, offering high-performance rendering while staying language-friendly. It signals growing interest in GPU-accelerated UI toolchains outside mainstream JS frameworks and could enable more responsive, graphics-heavy apps built in Zig.
items.summary_zh: Gooey 是面向 Zig 的 GPU 加速 UI 框架，提供高性能渲染并保持语言友好性。它体现了在非主流语言生态中对 GPU 加速 UI 工具链的兴趣，或推动用 Zig 构建更流畅、图形密集型的应用。

items.title_en: Mathematicians issue warning as AI rapidly gains ground
items.title_zh: Mathematicians issue warning as AI rapidly gains ground
items.summary_en: Mathematicians warn that AI progress is accelerating beyond current theory and verification methods. The piece calls for deeper mathematical foundations for AI safety, formal verification, and robust governance as models scale. The takeaway is a push for rigorous math to back reliable AI deployment.
items.summary_zh: 数学家警告人工智能的进展正在快速超出现有理论与验证手段的能力。文章呼吁在 AI 安全、形式化验证和治理方面建立更扎实的数学基础，以应对大规模模型带来的新挑战。

items.title_en: Every Byte Matters
items.title_zh: 每一个字节都很重要
items.summary_en: Every byte counts in modern systems, affecting latency, energy use, privacy, and costs. The piece argues for smarter data practices as a competitive advantage.
items.summary_zh: 在现代系统中，每一个字节都至关重要，关系到延迟、能耗、隐私和成本。文章主张通过更高效的数据实践获得竞争优势。

items.title_en: Show HN: Open Terminal – A Bloomberg Style App for Research
items.title_zh: Open Terminal：面向研究的 Bloomberg 风格应用
items.summary_en: Open Terminal is an open-source research terminal offering a Bloomberg-style interface to access data, signals, and notes for researchers and developers. It aims to democratize terminal-like workflows with speed, privacy, and offline capabilities, enabling researchers to work more efficiently.
items.summary_zh: Open Terminal 是一个开源研究终端，模仿 Bloomberg 的界面来访问数据、信号与笔记，面向研究人员与开发者。目标是让研究工作流像使用专业终端一样高效，同时提供快速、隐私与离线能力。

items.title_en: A Mathematician's Lament (2002) [pdf]
items.title_zh: 《数学家的哀叹》(2002) [PDF]
items.summary_en: A classic critique of math education arguing for reform towards creative problem-solving and inquiry-based learning rather than rote procedures.
items.summary_zh: 这篇经典著作批判数学教育，主张通过探究式、创造性问题解决来取代机械记忆和灌输式教学，提倡改革教学方法。

items.title_en: Journey to JPEG XL: open-source experiments shaped the future of image coding
items.title_zh: 通往 JPEG XL 的旅程：开源实验塑造了图像编码的未来
items.summary_en: JPEG XL emerged from a decade of open-source experimentation, aimed at delivering high visual quality at smaller file sizes with broad toolchain support. The story shows how community-driven testing helped shape a practical, royalty-free image format that competes with older standards, and how openness accelerated adoption.
items.summary_zh: JPEG XL 源自多年的开源实验，目标是在保持高画质的同时实现更小的文件尺寸，并获得广泛的工具链支持。开源社区的持续试验促成了一个实用、免版税的图像格式，与传统标准相比具备更强的落地能力与采用潜力。

items.title_en: Angular v22
items.title_zh: Angular v22 发布
items.summary_en: Angular v22 ships with framework refinements, improved performance, and ergonomics for developers, along with updates to tooling and standards alignment. The release signals ongoing maturation of a legacy-spanning front-end ecosystem.
items.summary_zh: Angular v22 版本带来框架优化、性能提升和开发者体验改进，并伴随工具链与标准对齐的更新，体现前端生态的持续成熟。

items.title_en: Self-hosted dev sandboxes with preview URLs (Docker, Go, no K8s)
items.title_zh: 无需 K8s 的本地开发沙箱：Docker 与 Go 实现可预览 URL
items.summary_en: A project delivering self-hosted dev sandboxes using Docker and Go, offering ephemeral preview URLs without Kubernetes. This simplifies local development, reduces cloud dependencies, and enables easy sharing of build previews with teammates.
items.summary_zh: 该项目提供基于 Docker 和 Go 的自托管开发沙箱，支持无 Kubernetes 的临时预览 URL，简化本地开发、减少云依赖，并便于与团队共享构建预览。

items.title_en: New Texas Instruments 5532 chips are not the 5532s we’ve used for decades
items.title_zh: 新型号 TI 5532 芯片并非我们几十年来用过的那类
items.summary_en: New TI 5532 chips reportedly differ from classic 5532s, impacting audio electronics, requiring designers to verify specs, consider substitutes, and reassess performance expectations.
items.summary_zh: 据报道，新款 TI 5532 与几十年前的型号存在差异，可能影响音频电子设计，需要设计师核对规格、考虑替代方案并重新评估性能。

items.title_en: Show HN: Edsger – A handwritten Clojure REPL for the reMarkable 2
items.title_zh: Show HN：在 reMarkable 2 上运行的手写 Clojure REPL（Edsger）
items.summary_en: An experimental project ships a handwritten Clojure REPL on the reMarkable 2, letting you type and evaluate Clojure code directly on the e-ink device. It demonstrates how lightweight, on-device tooling can enable interactive programming far from a traditional IDE, even on constrained hardware. Proof-of-concept for embedding REPLs on unusual hardware.
items.summary_zh: 该项目把 Clojure 的手写 REPL 移植到 reMarkable 2，让在电子墨水设备上直接输入并执行代码成为可能。它展示了在资源受限设备上实现交互式编程的潜力，以及在极简硬件上的在地开发工具。

items.title_en: Dumbphone 2
items.title_zh: Dumbphone 2：极简手机二代
items.summary_en: The next iteration of the Dumbphone continues the minimalist philosophy, prioritizing reliable calls, privacy, and long battery life while avoiding smartphone distractions.
items.summary_zh: Dumbphone 2 继续推进极简设计，强调稳定通话、隐私保护和长续航，避免智能手机带来的干扰。

items.title_en: Launch HN: Hyper (YC P26) – Company brain to power agentic development
items.title_zh: Launch HN：Hyper（YC P26）——推动代理式开发的公司大脑
items.summary_en: Hyper, a YC P26 alumnus, positions itself as a 'company brain' to power agentic development—orchestrating AI agents across an organization. The platform aims to turn corporate data, workflows, and governance into actionable autonomous capabilities, reducing manual toil for developers and operators. It signals a shift toward toolchains that manage AI agents at scale.
items.summary_zh: Hyper（YC P26）定位为“公司大脑”，用于驱动代理式开发并在组织层面编排 AI 代理。该平台将企业数据、工作流与治理转化为可执行的自主能力，帮助开发者与运维人员减轻重复性工作。预示着面向大规模 AI 代理的工具链正在成形。

items.title_en: Embryos shape their limbs: a key discovery of "genetic brakes"
items.title_zh: 胚胎成形肢体：遗传“刹车”机制的关键发现
items.summary_en: Researchers uncover how embryos shape limb development through genetic brakes that prevent overgrowth or mispatterning. The finding helps explain robust development and could inform regenerative medicine or congenital limb disorders. It highlights the programmable brakes as essential to morphogenesis.
items.summary_zh: 研究揭示胚胎在肢体发育中通过“遗传刹车”来控制形态，避免过度生长或模式错位。此发现有助于理解发育的鲁棒性，并可能为再生医学和先天性肢体疾病的研究带来新线索。

items.title_en: Brume is a 24-voice multi-timbral desktop synth for the CM5
items.title_zh: Brume：为 CM5 提供的 24 声部桌面合成器
items.summary_en: Brume debuts as a 24-voice multi-timbral desktop synth built for the CM5, enabling layering of multiple patches with independent MIDI channels. The device targets studio and live players seeking compact, flexible hardware with desktop ergonomics.
items.summary_zh: Brume 推出一款面向 CM5 的桌面合成器，支持 24 声部多 timbral，让用户在同一机身上叠加多个声音并各自分配 MIDI 通道。体积紧凑、适合工作室和舞台使用，强调桌面化的便携与灵活性。

items.title_en: What I've learned about the trombone
items.title_zh: 我对长号学到的经验
items.summary_en: A reflective piece on learning the trombone shares practical habits for mastering a musical instrument—patience, deliberate practice, and seeking feedback. The author's approach offers transferable insights into learning fast-moving technical skills.
items.summary_zh: 这篇关于学习长号的反思文章分享了练习耐心、精确练习和积极反馈等实用习惯。作者的学习方法也能为掌握快速迭代的技术技能提供可迁移的启示。

items.title_en: Show HN: Mnemo – local-first AI memory layer for any LLM (Rust, SQLite,petgraph)
items.title_zh: Mnemo：本地优先的 AI 记忆层，面向任意大型语言模型（Rust、SQLite、petgraph）
items.summary_en: Mnemo provides a local-first memory layer for LLMs, enabling on-device or local-then-sync memory storage using Rust, SQLite, and petgraph. This approach improves privacy and latency and can reduce reliance on external vector databases. It could become a building block for offline-capable AI apps.
items.summary_zh: Mnemo 为 LLM 提供本地优先的记忆层，利用 Rust、SQLite 和 petgraph 实现本地存储并可与云端同步。提高隐私与低延迟，降低对外部向量数据库的依赖，有望成为离线 AI 应用的基础组件。

items.title_en: U.S. Army Corps of Engineers Bay Model
items.title_zh: 美国陆军工程兵团海湾模型
items.summary_en: The Bay Model is a large-scale physical hydraulic model built by the U.S. Army Corps of Engineers to simulate tides, currents, and flood scenarios for San Francisco Bay. It represents mid-20th-century physical modeling that complemented early digital tools in coastal engineering and planning, influencing how engineers study hydrodynamics.
items.summary_zh: 美国陆军工程兵团用来模拟圣弗朗西斯科湾潮汐、水流与洪水情景的大型物理水动力模型，体现20世纪中叶物理建模在工程决策中的作用。它帮助研究沿海管理、港湾开发和灾害预测的直观理解，并推动了后续数字仿真的发展。

items.title_en: Stop Killing Games
items.title_zh: 停止扼杀游戏体验
items.summary_en: A manifesto arguing for game designs that respect player agency and long-term engagement rather than hollow trends that kill the game's vitality.
items.summary_zh: 一本呼吁回归玩家主导、注重长期体验的游戏设计宣言，拒绝削弱玩家体验的商业做法或强制性机制。

items.title_en: Under Notre Dame, a 'dig of the century' unearths 1,700 years of history
items.title_zh: 巴黎圣母院地下的‘世纪挖掘’揭露1700年的历史遗存
items.summary_en: A major archaeology dig beneath Notre Dame in Paris has unearthed artifacts spanning 1,700 years, offering new insight into the city’s Roman and medieval past. The finds include everyday objects and remnants of ancient streets, reframing how historians view Paris’s urban development.
items.summary_zh: 巴黎圣母院地下的重大考古挖掘揭露了跨越1700年的文物，为重新理解这座城市的罗马与中世纪历史提供新线索。出土的日常用品和古街遗迹等发现，重新勾勒了巴黎的城市演变过程。

items.title_en: thunderbolt-ibverbs: We have InfiniBand at home
items.title_zh: Thunderbolt-ibverbs：家用环境也能实现 InfiniBand
items.summary_en: A project demonstrates running InfiniBand verbs over Thunderbolt, bringing high-performance networking to consumer machines. By masking the complex hardware behind a familiar port, it enables hobbyists and researchers to experiment with RDMA-style communication without enterprise NICs.
items.summary_zh: 一个项目展示了通过 Thunderbolt 将 InfiniBand 的 verbs 运作在家用设备上，带来高性能、低延迟的网络连接。该方案让爱好者和研究者在没有企业级网卡的情况下，也能在家里试验 RDMA 风格的通信。

items.title_en: Meteor Explodes over Massachusetts
items.title_zh: 马萨诸塞州上空流星爆炸
items.summary_en: A bright meteor exploded over Massachusetts, shocking residents and generating numerous sightings. Scientists are still assessing the meteor's trajectory and whether any fragments reached the ground, underscoring the usefulness of sky cameras and crowdsourced reports in tracking near-Earth objects.
items.summary_zh: 马萨诸塞州上空出现一道浓艳的流星并发生爆炸，引发大量目击报道。科学家正在评估其轨迹与是否有碎片落地，这凸显了天文观测网络和大众参与数据在跟踪近地天体方面的作用。

items.title_en: Learn SQL Once, Use It for 30 Years
items.title_zh: 一次学会 SQL，30 年都能用
items.summary_en: A guide advocating deep mastery of SQL fundamentals, arguing that solid understanding of queries, joins, and data manipulation pays off for decades across DB systems. The piece emphasizes deliberate practice, real-world patterns, and continuous reuse.
items.summary_zh: 一篇倡导深入掌握 SQL 基本功的文章，认为对查询、联接和数据操作等要点的扎实理解能在未来几十年内在各数据库系统中持续受用。强调有目的的练习、实际模式与持续复用。

items.title_en: Show HN: I reverse-engineered the world maps of Test Drive III (1990 DOS game)
items.title_zh: Show HN：我逆向还原了 1990 年 DOS 游戏 Test Drive III 的世界地图
items.summary_en: I reverse-engineered the world maps of Test Drive III (1990 DOS game) to produce a machine-readable map dataset. The work reveals how classic games encoded level layouts and provides a model for preserving and exploring old software.
items.summary_zh: 我逆向还原了 1990 年 DOS 游戏 Test Drive III 的世界地图，生成了可机器读取的地图数据。这项工作揭示了经典游戏如何对关卡布局进行编码，并为保存与再现老游戏提供了有价值的参考。

items.title_en: Patching my guitar amp's firmware
items.title_zh: 给我的吉他放大器固件打补丁
items.summary_en: Documenting the process of patching a guitar amplifier's firmware, including the motivations (fixes, features), the risks, and the DIY workflow.
items.summary_zh: 记录为吉他放大器固件打补丁的过程，涵盖动机、风险与 DIY 开发流程，展示如何在硬件设备上自助改进功能与修复问题。

items.title_en: Nabokov's pale fire: the lost 'father of all hypertext demos'? (2011)
items.title_zh: Nabokov 的《盎然之火》：2011 年失落的“所有超文本演示之父”？
items.summary_en: An exploration of Nabokov's Pale Fire and its status as a potential early hypertext demonstration, offering a historical lens on the evolution of nonlinear writing and digital literature. The piece contextualizes how early experiments foreshadow modern hypertext and interfaces.
items.summary_zh: 本文探讨《盎然之火》在超文本历史中的地位，作为早期超文本演示的候选之一。通过历史视角理解非线性叙事与数字文学的演变。

items.title_en: How turkey hacked the hair-transplant industry
items.title_zh: 土耳其如何改变了植发行业
items.summary_en: Wired dives into how Turkey became a hub for hair transplants, examining medical tourism, business models, and regulatory gaps enabled by outsourcing and technology.
items.summary_zh: Wired 深入报道土耳其如何成为植发行业的全球中心，分析医疗旅游、商业模式与监管缺口，以及外包与技术如何推动行业扩张。

items.title_en: Claude Code and Codex Can Have Real-Time Conversation via Git
items.title_zh: Claude Code 与 Codex 可以通过 Git 实时对话
items.summary_en: Claude Code and Codex can engage in real-time conversations via Git, enabling developers to chat with AI while reviewing or editing code. This tight integration accelerates debugging and learning within the natural workflow of commits, branches, and diffs.
items.summary_zh: Claude Code 和 Codex 现在可以通过 Git 实时对话，使开发者在审查或修改代码时即可与 AI 进行交流。这样的集成让调试和学习更贴近真正的版本控制工作流程。

items.title_en: Kiki – a tiny homepage construction kit with a small footprint
items.title_zh: Kiki：一款小巧的首页构建工具
items.summary_en: Kiki is a tiny, lightweight homepage construction kit with a small footprint, designed for rapid assembly of simple personal sites. It emphasizes minimal dependencies and fast load times, ideal for static sites or resource-constrained environments.
items.summary_zh: Kiki 是一个极简、体积小的首页构建工具，依赖极少，目标是快速搭建简单的个人主页。它强调低依赖和快速加载，适合静态站点或资源受限的场景。

items.title_en: 3D-printed book turns its own G-code into raised lettering
items.title_zh: 3D 打印书籍将自身 G-code 变成浮雕字
items.summary_en: A 3D-printed book uses its own G-code to generate raised lettering, creating a tactile typographic effect. The project showcases self-referential fabrication and demonstrates how digital instructions can directly manifest as accessible, embossed text, blending design, 3D printing, and printed media.
items.summary_zh: 一本3D打印的书将自身的G-code转化为浮雕字，实质在印刷品上呈现凸起的文本。这一自指式设计展示了数字指令到物理排版的直接转化，融合设计、3D 打印与可访问性。

items.title_en: CP/M-86 & MS-DOS Cross Development Environment
items.title_zh: CP/M-86 与 MS-DOS 的跨平台开发环境
items.summary_en: A project provides a cross-development environment to build CP/M-86 and MS-DOS software on modern hosts, leveraging emulation and toolchains. It makes vintage x86 development more approachable for hobbyists and educators.
items.summary_zh: 一个项目提供了在现代主机上构建 CP/M-86 和 MS-DOS 软件的跨开发环境，利用仿真工具链，使复古的 x86 开发对爱好者和教育者更易接近。

items.title_en: Now Is the Best Time to Be a Duct Tape Engineer
items.title_zh: 现在是成为“胶带工程师”的最佳时机
items.summary_en: Now Is the Best Time to Be a Duct Tape Engineer argues that today's toolkit, from cheap parts to open hardware and rapid prototyping, enables engineers to ship ideas quickly with pragmatic tradeoffs. It champions resourcefulness, cross-disciplinary tinkering, and the value of low-cost, iterative solutions that accelerate innovation.
items.summary_zh: 文章认为当下的工程环境为快速原型开发提供了充足工具：廉价零件、开源工具和快速迭代让工程师能够用有限资源快速落地方案。强调务实、跨学科协作，以及低成本、可重复性的迭代解决方案在推动创新中的价值。

items.title_en: Show HN: Prela – Purely Algebraic Relation Combinators
items.title_zh: Prela：纯代数关系组合子
items.summary_en: Prela provides a purely algebraic framework for relation combinators, enabling declarative construction and manipulation of relations without procedural code. The approach could influence databases, program analysis, and symbolic computation by offering a solid mathematical foundation.
items.summary_zh: Prela 提供一个纯代数框架，用于关系的组合子，强调以声明式方式构造与操作关系，而非依赖过程性代码。这一思路有望为数据库、程序分析与符号计算提供坚实的数学基础。

items.title_en: The Capacity of HotHands to Facilitate High-Altitude Research (2023) [pdf]
items.title_zh: HotHands 在高空研究中的能力（2023）[PDF]
items.summary_en: A 2023 study evaluates HotHands' capability to enable high-altitude research, detailing how portable heating systems support experiments at 100,000 feet. The report discusses use cases for balloon-borne experiments and discusses performance, power, and safety considerations.
items.summary_zh: 一份2023年的研究评估 HotHands 在高空研究中的应用能力，重点在于在极端环境中提供可靠加热以支撑实验。报告探讨了用于气球/平流层任务的场景、性能、电力需求与安全要点。
